title: Together Again
meaning_summary: Its emotional warmth and pop clarity help it remain commercially durable well beyond its original release cycle.
revenue_drivers: Streaming and feel-good playlist use support ongoing replay.
Long-term listener familiarity keeps the song active.
Retrospective media use helps sustain catalog attention.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Together Again is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
